assertion_results.text: Each task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files (task-1 through task-5) contain every required section: Repository (e.g., task-1 line 1-2), Target Branch (e.g., task-1 line 4-5), Description (e.g., task-1 line 7+), Files to Create and/or Files to Modify (e.g., task-1 has both, task-2 has Files to Modify only), Implementation Notes (present in all), Acceptance Criteria (present in all with checkbox items), Test Requirements (present in all with checkbox items).

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are exactly 5 task files: task-1-advisory-summary-model.md, task-2-advisory-summary-service.md, task-3-advisory-summary-endpoint.md, task-4-cache-invalidation.md, task-5-integration-tests.md. 5 is within [3, 10].
All 5 task files contain '## Repository\ntrustify-backend' as their first section. Verified in task-1 (line 1-2), task-2 (line 1-2), task-3 (line 1-2), task-4 (line 1-2), task-5 (line 1-2).

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency chain: Task 1 has no dependencies. Task 2 depends on Task 1. Task 3 depends on Task 2. Task 4 depends on Task 3. Task 5 depends on Task 3. This forms a DAG: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> {4, 5}. No circular dependencies exist.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: All modified files exist in repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs, modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs, tests/Cargo.toml. All created files are new files in directories that exist in the repo structure: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs (model/ dir exists), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (endpoints/ dir exists), tests/api/sbom_advisory_summary.rs (tests/api/ dir exists).

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: Impact map specifies: concrete struct name 'AdvisorySeveritySummary' with fields (critical, high, medium, low, total), specific endpoint path 'GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary', specific method name 'advisory_severity_summary', specific query details ('sbom_advisory join table, groups by severity, deduplicates by advisory ID'), and specific cache configuration ('5-minute cache'). All entries reference exact file paths and describe precise changes.

assertion_results.evidence: All 5 tasks have '## Repository\ntrustify-backend' with exactly one repository name. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 tasks contain: '## Target Branch' (set to 'main'), '## Description' (with substantive content), '## Acceptance Criteria' (with checkbox items), '## Test Requirements' (with checkbox items). Verified across all task files.

assertion_results.evidence: Every modified path matches the repo-backend.md directory tree: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (line 41), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (line 46), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (line 48), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (line 83), tests/Cargo.toml (line 114). assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs (SbomSummary pattern) and modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs (severity representation). Task 4 references modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs pipeline and entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs. assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted with a format-tagged SHA-256 hash — exactly 64 lowercase hex characters prefixed by 'sha256-md:' or 'sha256-adf:', not a placeholder, abbreviated value, or example string. Marker format: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:<64-char-hex>' (or sha256-adf). The digest is computed by re-fetching the description from the API and running scripts/sha256-digest.py
assertion_results.evidence: digests.md contains exactly 5 lines matching the required format, one per task: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:c4bfbeae7f18baeea9dc928e240560a31063d95d3d47bc69f178c4b04987a1bf', 'sha256-md:d48b2334c5c10f47b396f139e3f27d48b97b964440468bafdd52711c44332fca', 'sha256-md:4a59e297ebcbc3f58fa5b57bada2dceb3e4ba005fedac8efc7b424c9be814b10', 'sha256-md:645afaeeb413c54f5edeef974d1158dd05387608c41c6afd4bda6047752909f4', 'sha256-md:9b0c9be73e48454adc05418b8c198f9c363484d0c66c485d7b06af6af01c1607'. Each hash is exactly 64 lowercase hex characters. All use the sha256-md: prefix. Not placeholders or abbreviated values.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention — inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: All tasks include convention rationales in the prescribed format. Examples: Task 1 has 'Applies: task creates modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs matching the convention's .rs module scope.' Task 2 has 'Applies: task modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs matching the convention's .rs Rust scope.' Task 3 has 'Applies: task modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs matching the convention's .rs Rust scope.' Task 4 has 'Applies: task modifies modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs matching the convention's .rs Rust scope.' Task 5 has 'Applies: task creates tests/api/sbom_advisory_summary.rs matching the convention's .rs test file scope.' No free-form prose rationales found. No 'Not applicable' annotations found. All conventions reference specific files from the task's Files to Modify/Create sections.
